project_privacy_data_flows.data_type: User-Shared Content (text, URLs, subject from any app)
project_privacy_data_flows.description: The user shares text, URLs, or subjects from any Android app to Home Assistant via the Android share intent. The app receives the shared content and fires it as a mobile_app.share event to the Home Assistant server.

flow_steps.details: User selects 'Share to Home Assistant' from any Android app's share sheet. The app receives ACTION_SEND intent.
The app extracts the caller app identity (referrer) and shared content: EXTRA_SUBJECT, EXTRA_TEXT (which may be text or a URL).
The shared content (caller, subject, text/URL) is immediately sent to the Home Assistant server via REST API as a 'mobile_app.share' event. No local storage.
